name: Cyberpunk Dashboard UI
description: A high-density control dashboard with a neon-on-dark palette, monospace data readouts, glowing borders, scanline/holographic accents, animated data widgets, and a grid-based layout. Cyberpunk aesthetic: cyan/magenta neon, dark background, tech type.

requiredElements.name: dark-base
requiredElements.description: A near-black background (#0a0e1a-ish) as the base layer; all neon reads against it.

requiredElements.name: neon-accent-palette
requiredElements.description: A constrained neon palette (cyan + magenta + one warning amber) used consistently for active/highlight states.

requiredElements.name: monospace-data-type
requiredElements.description: Numeric/data readouts use a monospace font for tabular alignment and tech feel.

requiredElements.name: glowing-borders
requiredElements.description: Widget panels have thin glowing borders (box-shadow neon glow) rather than flat outlines.

requiredElements.name: grid-layout
requiredElements.description: A CSS grid (or equivalent) layout organizing widgets into a clear, scannable density.

requiredElements.name: live-data-widget
requiredElements.description: At least one widget shows live/animated data (sparkline, gauge, or scrolling log).

optionalElements.name: scanlines
optionalElements.description: Subtle scanline overlay (repeating-linear-gradient) for CRT/hologram feel; kept low opacity.

optionalElements.name: glitch-transition
optionalElements.description: Occasional glitch/RGB-split transition on view changes.

optionalElements.name: corner-brackets
optionalElements.description: L-shaped corner bracket decorations on panels instead of full borders.

qualityRules.description: Neon accents pop against the dark base with strong luminance contrast.
Glow intensity is consistent across widgets of the same priority.
Grid gaps and panel padding are uniform (consistent spacing scale).
Data text is legible (size >=13px, sufficient contrast on dark bg).
Labels have >=4.5:1 contrast against their background.
Live widgets animate smoothly (data updates transition, not jump).
Uses semantic landmarks (header/nav/main/section) not div soup.
Layout adapts (grid collapses) on narrow viewports; has a viewport meta tag.
Glow/scanlines use transform/opacity compositing, not layout-thrashing box-shadow animation.
Neon colors and spacing defined as CSS custom properties, not hardcoded everywhere.

antiPatterns.description: Using many unrelated neon hues breaks the constrained cyberpunk palette and looks chaotic.
Dim neon data text on dark background fails readability.
Animating box-shadow for glow triggers layout/paint cost every frame.
Hex colors inlined per-element makes palette changes impossible.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add a subtle scanline overlay for holographic depth.
Replace full borders with L-shaped corner brackets for a more authentic HUD look.
Add occasional glitch transitions on view switches.

exampleOutputs.label: Neon panel with glow border
exampleOutputs.snippet:
SYSTEM STATUS

UPTIME 99.97%
